name: In Los Angeles, talked to AI about my ranking drop already. Can that hurt my case?
description: Yes, discoverable evidence; disclose to attorney.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: In Los Angeles, talked to AI about my ranking drop already. Can that hurt my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, discoverable evidence; disclose to attorney.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, those chats are discoverable and unprotected in CA courts too, per guidance.[1][3] Similar to NY ruling.[1] Key factors: no privilege, hallucinations common.[3] Inform lawyer, avoid further use, prepare for deposition questions.[1] CA bar warns on AI supervision.[3]
